basic_details.job_title: NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Ahmedabad
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Ahmedabad (NIPER Ahmedabad) Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website www.niperahm.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.S. (Pharm)/M.Tech/M.Sc in Pharma/Chemistry/Biotechnology with 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/PH)
qualification.details: M.S. (Pharm)/M Tech/M.Sc in field aligned with Pharma or Chemistry or Biotechnology. PG degree with 60% marks for GN/OBC (55% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC Recognized University/ Institute, autonomous bodies NIPER/IITs/IISER. Desired: GATE/CSIR/UGC NET/GPAT qualified. Handled small protein purification and analysis.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA as per applicable rate

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Interview/Screening Process Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIPER Ahmedabad is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.S. (Pharm)/M.Tech/M.Sc in Pharma, Chemistry, or Biotechnology with at least 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/PH) from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus HRA as per applicable rates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates, an interview or screening process, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIPER Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIPER Ahmedabad Junior Research Fellow recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIPER Ahmedabad offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. Are candidates with GATE/CSIR/UGC NET/GPAT qualification preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, having qualified in GATE/CSIR/UGC NET/GPAT is considered a desired qualification for this position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of NIPER Ahmedabad.
